entities.name: Information Engineering
entities.context: Discipline for deliberate manipulation of qualitative information to accelerate learning, decision-making, and creation

entities.name: Data Engineering
entities.context: Established discipline that handles quantitative information

entities.name: Epistemology
entities.context: Domain under which Information Engineering distinction falls

entities.name: Qualitative Information
entities.context: Type of information that Information Engineering addresses, currently lacking a dedicated craft

entities.name: Quantitative Information
entities.context: Type of information handled by Data Engineering

relationships.context: Distinct but parallel disciplines—one for qualitative, one for quantitative information
Information Engineering is the craft for manipulating qualitative information
